title: up in the Sky
description: An rpg exploration server. floating islands, planes, skills, dimensions, trade and more.
body:
This is an RPG server featuring skills, bosses and flying islands. 
The main idea is to make most feature harder then just a simple craft or locking them behind certain skills. Smithing feels way more like the real stuff instead of trowing some sticks and ingots on a crafting table. You want to fly on a plan? well then you need to be able to pilot one, pls increase your "ingenuity".
A monetary system is also in place, as well as a growing quest book. 
.
### DISCLAIMER
1. THis server is in development, so don't exepect all feature to be polished yet.
2. THis pack is made for the people playing on my server: up-in-the-sky.exaroton.me
3. In other words, all the server sided mods are missing, as well as the datapacks for the skill system, quests, etc.
